title: Underfolk: Legacy Cave Dweller mod
description: Newest genre-redefining, trope-subverting, atmospheric, dark and eerie, dread-inducing, bone-chilling slow burn with “say more with less” approach, blood-curdling, free of any cheap gore, cartoonish CGI or infantile jumpscares 1.12.2 horror mod.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6240ca3bba4c0824715a573ada8d266c873f90a8.jpeg)


**Underfolk is the newest Nick-produced, genre-redefining, trope-subverting, atmospheric, dark and eerie, emotionally draining, gut wrenching, dread-inducing, bone-chilling slow burn with “say more with less” approach, blood-curdling, free of any cheap gore, cartoonish CGI or infantile jumpscares 1.12.2 horror mod.**

Underfolk is aimed to cover the niche left in the 1.12.2 modding space: the criminal lack of ~~low~~ HIGH quality Cave Dweller mobs. 

The creature you are inviting into your world is unlike anything you've seen before: gone are the overused screamers, obnoxious mp3 files, and juvenile designs; replaced with a realistic depiction of a subterranean haunt: emanciated, cannibalistic, gasping for breath.  

Prepare to forfeit your world, {{username}}. It no longer belongs to you.

## 

**_...If you haven't caught on yet, this is a joke submission._**
